title: Unify progress: persist per-deck daily X/Y (schema V3)
description:
Unify the app's three progress indicators (Home "Today's Practice" banner, each deck card's "X/Y today", and the in-session top bar) onto ONE persisted per-(day, deck) model, so they always agree. Owner-agreed design (2026-07-20), decisions locked:
- dailyTarget (Y): cards to practise today for a deck, SNAPSHOTTED ONCE at day start (fixed, never shrinks).
- completedToday (X): a card is done for the day on ONE correct grade (Hard/Good/Easy, not Again), distinct per card per day, MODE-INDEPENDENT.
- Deck card = X/Y; in-session bar = the SAME X/Y for that deck; Home banner = Σ(Y−X) REMAINING (counts down).
- Session ends when X = Y (the session-ends-when-cleared behaviour already shipped via SessionQueue.markGraded re-queue-only-on-Again).

Deep-dive findings (why they don't line up today): three notions, three denominators, two "done" defs, and NO persisted "completed today" counter. Key bugs: (I1) DeckCardView Y = allowance.total is REMAINING (shrinks as you work) while X = newIntroduced+reviewsDone is cumulative → the "X/Y today" bar hits 100% then snaps back. (I3) the in-session bar and the deck X advance on DIFFERENT events (session bar = distinct non-Again; deck X = newIntroduced/reviewsDone which fire only on previousState new/review, and even on Again). (I5) newIntroduced counts introductions not completions.

Implementation (a V3 lightweight SwiftData migration on real device data — do carefully, test against a seeded pre-migration store):
1. DailyStats: add `dailyTarget: Int = 0` and `completedCardIDs: [String] = []` (completedToday = count; remainingToday = max(0, target-count)).
2. ModelSchema.swift: add KakitoriSchemaV3 (live models) + a lightweight V2→V3 stage; FREEZE V2's DailyStats as a nested @Model (current shape: day/cardsWritten/newIntroduced/reviewsDone/secondsStudied/deckKey) since V2 currently references the live class. Point KakitoriApp.makeModelContainer at V3.
3. StatsRecorder: add `ensureDailyStats(for deck, now, newPerDay, maxReviewsPerDay, in:)` (fetch/create the (day,deck) row; on creation snapshot dailyTarget = DailyAllowance.forDeck(...).total with 0 done, using AppClock.endOfToday(after:)); add `recordCompletion(cardID, deckKey, now, in:)` (append id to completedCardIDs if absent). Keep recordGrade for cardsWritten/streak.
4. SessionViewModel: at init call ensureDailyStats(deck); exclude already-completed-today cards from the built queue; on a non-Again grade call recordCompletion; expose dayTarget/dayCompleted; end session when dayCompleted >= dayTarget OR queue empty.
5. SessionView: bar + "N done · M left" read dayCompleted/dayTarget (deck day progress), not the session-local count.
6. DeckCardView: X/Y = completedToday/dailyTarget from the row (fresh-quota fallback if no row yet, X=0); bar = X/Y; "All caught up" when X>=Y.
7. TodayBannerView: remaining = Σ(dailyTarget - completedToday); scriptCount for decks with remaining>0. "N characters to write" = remaining.
8. Tests: migration test (seed a V2-shaped/legacy row, assert it survives + fields default), StatsRecorder ensure/record tests (injected clock), DailyStats X/Y computed props, and update/replace SessionQueueProgressTests. Dual-device visual verify (Kakitori-Sim + Kakitori-Sim-Phone) that all three bars show the same numbers.

The half-built V3 branch was parked (not merged) to avoid rushing a data migration; this is the spec to build it cleanly. See memory unified-progress-design.
